response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, including C/C++ (minimal exposure in past roles), but lacks direct experience with C++ in industrial automation, cloud platforms (Azure), or cybersecurity standards like IEC 62443. His background is heavily skewed toward Node.js, TypeScript, and D programming, with no clear evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) or industrial cybersecurity practices. His strengths in agile methodologies and system design are notable, but the misalignment with core technical competencies for this role is significant.
strengths: Strong multi-language expertise (C/C++, Node.js, D, Java, Python)
Experience with high-performance, low-latency applications and real-time systems
Demonstrated leadership in open-source projects and mentorship (e.g., Refactoring Dojos, Code Kata sessions)
concerns: Limited or no direct experience with C++ in industrial automation or on-premises/cloud platforms
No evidence of applying IEC 62443 or SDL practices for cybersecurity
Lack of exposure to cloud services (e.g., Microsoft Azure) or industrial protocols (Modbus TCP/IP, OPC UA)

key_factors.factor: C++ and STL experience in industrial automation
Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) and IEC 62443 compliance
Cloud platform experience (Azure) and industrial protocols
